generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components (Inferred from DT services)
instance ClosedLoopController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Enables closed-loop control adjustments based on digital insights, potentially interfacing with physical actuators for parameter optimization or system reconfiguration."
]

instance OptimizationEngine : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Performs resource allocation and process efficiency optimization using behavioral models and simulation results."
]

instance AlertGenerator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Generates autonomous alerts or push notifications back to physical systems for maintenance, fault detection, or operational adjustments."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components (Not in Document - Skipped)

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance PhysicalSystemStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Automated one-way data flow from physical system capturing state variables, operational metrics, and environmental parameters via passive data acquisition."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalSystemStateSensor
]

instance ContextualDataTracesTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Aggregated contextual traces from physical system with predefined thresholds or operational cycles for periodic/event-driven collection."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalSystemContextualSensor
]

// C6: Services
instance DataInterpretationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interprets and processes incoming data from physical system in real-time or near-real-time, performing aggregation, abstraction, and contextualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataInsight, DataContextualizationAction
]

instance BehavioralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Leverages state machines (SysML v1.7), MontiArc Automaton, or simulation tools to model dynamic behavior for predictive analytics and scenario testing."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveFailureInsight, SystemResponseValidationInsight
]

instance ControlAndOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides closed-loop control capabilities and optimization services for resource allocation and process efficiency based on digital insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationRecommendationInsight, ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualizationAndDecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offers interactive visualization of system states, performance metrics, and anomalies through dashboards, 3D modeling, or real-time analytics for stakeholder-specific insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualizationInsight, DecisionSupportRecommendationInsight
]

instance AutonomousDataPushService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Pushes processed insights or alerts back to physical system for maintenance, reconfiguration, or fault detection, contrasting with passive Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertAction, ReconfigurationTriggerAction
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLFunctionalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML-based functional architecture model defining system components, interfaces, and interconnections using Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler, SimulationIntegrationEnabler
]

instance MontiArcComponentConnectorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc-based component-connector architecture model with behavioral extensions via MontiArc Automaton for dynamic system specification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler, SimulationIntegrationEnabler
]

instance MathWorksSimulinkBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic system simulation model using MathWorks Simulink for control design, signal processing, and physics-based behavioral modeling."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppJavaIntegrationEnabler
]

instance PhysicalSystemStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured digital representation of physical system state variables, operational metrics, and environmental parameters after aggregation and abstraction."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhysicalSystemStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ContextualDataTraces : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed contextual traces from physical system with enriched metadata, normalized dimensions, and extracted features for DT modeling requirements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ContextualDataTracesTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, SimulationIntegrationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 modeling framework supporting multi-layered abstraction (requirements, architecture, behavior) with Internal Block Diagrams and state machines."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataInterpretationService, BehavioralModelingService
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc framework for component-connector modeling with MontiArc Automaton extensions for behavioral specification and dynamic system analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralModelingService, ControlAndOptimizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink simulation engine for dynamic system modeling, control design, and signal processing with integration capabilities for hybrid modeling."
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralModelingService, ControlAndOptimizationService
]

instance CppJavaIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "General-purpose programming integration layer using C++/Java for low-level control, real-time processing, and interfacing with physical systems (e.g., PLCs, IoT devices)."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAndOptimizationService, AutonomousDataPushService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated data processing pipeline for real-time/near-real-time aggregation, abstraction, filtering, normalization, and feature extraction of physical system traces."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataInterpretationService, VisualizationAndDecisionSupportService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Database layer for storing contextual data traces, aggregated metrics, and historical logs (e.g., time-series or relational databases)."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationAndDecisionSupportService, BehavioralModelingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization toolchain including 3D modeling (Unity/Unreal), dashboards (Grafana/Tableau), and SysML-based viewers for interactive system exploration."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationAndDecisionSupportService
]

instance SimulationIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interoperability layer bridging modeling tools (SysML, MontiArc) with simulation engines (Simulink) for unified behavioral analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralModelingService, ControlAndOptimizationService
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated and contextualized real-time data from physical system enabling immediate situational awareness."
]

instance DataContextualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated contextual enrichment of raw data traces with metadata and operational context for enhanced modeling."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveFailureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Proactive identification of potential failures or performance degradation using behavioral models and simulation scenarios."
]

instance SystemResponseValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of system responses through simulated scenarios and behavioral modeling to ensure compliance with operational requirements."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for resource allocation and process efficiency improvements based on digital twin analysis."
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of control parameters in physical system based on digital twin insights and optimization results."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Multi-dimensional visualization of system states, performance metrics, and operational anomalies for stakeholder-specific decision support."
]

instance DecisionSupportRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Strategic recommendations for managers derived from digital twin insights, including resource planning and lifecycle management."
]

instance MaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation and transmission of maintenance alerts to physical system operators based on predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReconfigurationTriggerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated triggering of system reconfiguration procedures in physical system based on digital twin insights."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Environment (Inferred from system context)
instance DigitalTwinEngineeringEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MBSE-based Digital Twin development environment supporting heterogeneous stakeholder integration and multi-notation/modeling tool coordination."
    base:contains SysMLFunctionalArchitectureModel,
                MontiArcComponentConnectorModel,
                MathWorksSimulinkBehavioralModel,
                DataInterpretationService,
                BehavioralModelingService,
                ControlAndOptimizationService,
                VisualizationAndDecisionSupportService,
                AutonomousDataPushService,
                SysMLModelingEnabler,
                MontiArcEnabler,
                SimulinkEnabler,
                CppJavaIntegrationEnabler,
                DataProcessingEnabler,
                DataStorageEnabler,
                VisualizationEnabler,
                SimulationIntegrationEnabler
]

instance RequirementsLayerComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "System requirements layer modeled using MBSE methodologies (RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT) for traceability and consistency."
]

instance FunctionalArchitectureComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [

instance LogicalArchitectureComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [

]

instance PhysicalSystemStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Generic placeholder for physical system state sensors capturing operational metrics and environmental parameters."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalSystemStateDataTransmitted
]

instance PhysicalSystemContextualSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Generic placeholder for contextual sensors collecting operational traces and performance data from physical system."

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin (DT) system’s orchestration and coordination are implicitly tied to **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** methodologies (e.g., RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, or SMArDT) and **architecture description languages (ADLs)** like ACME, AADL, or MontiArc. These frameworks enable **component integration** through defined interfaces (e.g., connectors in ADLs) and **behavioral modeling** (e.g., state machines in SysML v1.7 or MontiArc Automaton). For system-wide coordination, the document suggests combining ADLs with **simulation tools** (e.g., MathWorks Simulink) or **general-purpose languages** (e.g., C++, Java) to manage complex interactions. However, no explicit **orchestration patterns** (e.g., microservices, service-oriented architecture) or **resource management** (e.g., load balancing, fault tolerance) are described. The lack of mention of **real-time constraints** or **synchronization protocols** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) further limits specificity."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system incorporates **fidelity requirements** aligned with MBSE methodologies, where model accuracy is ensured through **multi-layer validation and verification (V&V)** processes. Key considerations include:
  - **Uncertainty quantification** derived from **data trace aggregation** and **abstraction methods** (as per the Digital Shadow Reference Model).
  - **Error detection and correction mechanisms** leveraging **simulation tools** (e.g., Simulink) and **general-purpose programming** for dynamic model adjustments.
  - **Quality assurance processes** that integrate **heterogeneous stakeholder feedback** and **tool-specific validation protocols** (e.g., SysML compliance checks, ADL consistency validations).
  The system’s **passive data flow** (one-way from physical to digital) necessitates **active software components** for real-time interpretation, though explicit **safety constraints** or **remote control interfaces** are not detailed in the provided documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The document highlights the need for **interoperability** between heterogeneous systems, tools, and stakeholders in Digital Twin (DT) implementations. While no specific **data exchange protocols** (e.g., OPC UA, REST, gRPC) or **interoperability standards** (e.g., ISO 23224, GAIA-X) are named, the integration is implied through:
  1. **MBSE toolchains** (e.g., SysML for modeling + Simulink for simulation + C++/Java for execution), requiring **model-to-code or model-to-model transformations**.
  2. **Architecture description languages (ADLs)** like ACME or AADL, which standardize component interfaces for cross-system communication.
  3. **Digital Shadow reference models** (e.g., Fig. 1’s UML class diagram), suggesting **data aggregation and abstraction layers** for external system dependencies.
   Dependencies on external systems (e.g., ERP, MES, or other DTs) are not detailed, nor are **integration patterns** (e.g., event-driven, API gateways, or enterprise service buses). The document does not specify whether integration is **synchronous/asynchronous** or governed by **standardized ontologies** (e.g., for semantic interoperability)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system for the MABI MAX 100 serial robot incorporates **safety-critical system considerations** through the **safety cell**, which restricts the operational range of the first vertical axis to **[-90°, 90°]** and enforces a **maximum achievable speed of |q̇_max| = 75 [°/s]**. **Fail-safe mechanisms** are implicitly supported by the **dual encoder system** (motor encoder and secondary encoder behind the gearbox), which mitigates backlash and positional uncertainty by analyzing encoder discrepancies to infer **elasticity and friction** in the drive train. **Cybersecurity protocols** are not explicitly detailed, but the system relies on the **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller**, a hardened industrial-grade platform designed for **subtractive manufacturing processes** (e.g., milling), which inherently includes **access control mechanisms** for axis-specific inputs (position, speed, acceleration) and outputs (target/actual position, derivatives, motor current). **Threat mitigation strategies** are not explicitly described, though the **closed-loop control architecture** (encoder feedback + motor torque conversion via known motor constants) ensures real-time integrity of critical operational parameters. **Risk assessment approaches** are not documented, but the **gear transmission and cycloidal gear design** (with torque outputs τ_G and τ_out) imply redundancy in mechanical safety layers."
]
